name: Awbridge
overview: Awbridge is a small Test Valley village and civil parish about three miles north-west of Romsey, near the River Test. It has a traditional Hampshire village profile, with scattered housing, village facilities and strong access to surrounding countryside. The location balances rural character with relatively quick links to Romsey and Southampton employment centres.
character: Traditional village/parish character with quiet lanes and community-led local life.
amenities: Village hall and local community activity
Nearby supermarkets and rail services in Romsey

prices.summary: SO51 pricing reflects Romsey/Test Valley demand with village premiums in quieter lanes.

thingsToDo: Village and Test Valley countryside walking
Access nearby Mottisfont and Romsey attractions
placesToEat: Pubs and restaurants in Romsey/Test Valley area
pros: Rural feel with good access to Romsey
cons: Most larger services are outside the village
whoItSuits: Well suited to families and downsizers wanting Hampshire village character close to Romsey transport and services.
